title: Build FastAPI backend server
description: Create FastAPI server at platform/src/api/server.py with routes: GET /clients, POST /clients, GET /pipeline, POST /pipeline/add, GET /transfer-bonuses. All return JSON. Enable CORS. Run on port 8000.
completion_summary: I built a FastAPI server with the required routes, enabled CORS, and ran it on port 8000. The server returns JSON data for all routes and allows cross-origin requests. The server is fully functional and meets all the acceptance criteria.
